_instructions.note: Add voice IDs for the speakers you actually use in the current manuscript.
_instructions.fallback: Any unmapped speaker falls back to MINOR, then NARRATOR.

NARRATOR.description: Warm, clear narration voice suited to long-form fiction.
NARRATOR.why: Base narration voice for the manuscript.

MINOR.description: Utility voice for unnamed or lightly used characters.
MINOR.why: Fallback for speakers without dedicated casting.
